title: Junior Instructional Designer at AIF Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Junior Instructional Designer at AIF Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Join the AIF Holdings Services family as a Instructional Designer in Nagpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About AIF Holdings Services:
AIF Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Support students with special educational needs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in E-learning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AIF Holdings Services!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
